document_counts.note: Run 'npm run ingest' to populate the database. Counts reflect ingested data, not total available publications.

known_gaps: Restricted or classified CERT.hr documents are not publicly available and are excluded
Pre-2023 advisories may be incomplete — CERT.hr archive coverage before 2023 is partial
NIS2 legislative changes pending full Croatian transposition may not yet be reflected
Machine-translated English titles (title_en field) may contain minor errors
Documents published only in Croatian may have limited English metadata
update_frequency: Periodic — triggered via GitHub Actions ingest workflow
license: Public domain — official Croatian government publications
